title: Coasty Templates
description: Puts smithing templates up on display with Brewin' And Chewin's coasters.
body:
This resource pack makes use of Brewin' and Chewin' coasters and gives smithing templates a custom model when placed on them. Requires [Brewin' and Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin) mod.

![Lineup of all vanilla smithing templates.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l3Q1EQ3K/images/31dd6942f57b52e57981574c1e85c33c214410b4.png)

Also supports some modded templates! (more in the gallery)
![4.0.0 Line-up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ab61dd1b57453a49d47e837334f640010b6a78.png)

**Notes:** 
- While the pack format is for 1.20.1, it should also work on 1.21.1
- You may use this in your modpacks, as long as credit is given.
